feature_signal: Extensible shortest-path framework for map characters and generic graphs with swappable pathfinding/follow strategies.

feature_signal: Reusable parsing/evaluation core with expression grammar support for runtime formulas and plugin DSLs.

feature_signal: Text-to-event-command compiler for dialogue and event authoring with reverse extraction path (Frame2Text).
evidence: README states conversion from text files to event commands and release artifacts for both Text2Frame and Frame2Text.

feature_signal: Modern translation/editor workstation with batch processing, linting, asset inspection, and multi-engine format support.

feature_signal: Library-grade text extraction/writeback pipeline with structured reader/writer/purger abstractions for RPG Maker formats.
evidence: README describes reusable Reader/Writer/Purger APIs and conversion support across legacy and JSON-backed formats.

feature_signal: CLI-first packaging for multi-platform automated build/deploy with encryption and unused-file exclusion.
